subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! Know thou that We have arrived at the fortress of 'Akká with seventy souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه فاعلم بانا وردنا مع سبعین انفس فی حصن العکا و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @banishment to; life in 'Akka
